skill.name: Acrobatics
skill.entry: Stay on your feet in a tricky situation, or perform an acrobatic stunt.

skill.name: Animal Handling
skill.entry: Calm or train an animal, or get an animal to behave in a certain way.

skill.name: Arcana
skill.entry: Recall lore about spells, magic items, and the planes of existence.

skill.name: Athletics
skill.entry: Jump farther than normal, stay afloat in rough water, or break something.

skill.name: Deception
skill.entry: Tell a convincing lie, or wear a disguise convincingly.

skill.name: History
skill.entry: Recall lore about historical events, people, nations, and cultures.

skill.name: Insight
skill.entry: Discern a person's mood and intentions.

skill.name: Intimidation
skill.entry: Awe or threaten someone into doing what you want.

skill.name: Investigation
skill.entry: Find obscure information in books, or deduce how something works.

skill.name: Medicine
skill.entry: Diagnose an illness, or determine what killed the recently slain.

skill.name: Nature
skill.entry: Recall lore about terrain, plants, animals, and weather.

skill.name: Perception
skill.entry: Using a combination of senses, notice something that's easy to miss.

skill.name: Performance
skill.entry: Act, tell a story, perform music, or dance.

skill.name: Persuasion
skill.entry: Honestly and graciously convince someone of something.

skill.name: Religion
skill.entry: Recall lore about gods, religious rituals, and holy symbols.

skill.name: Sleight of Hand
skill.entry: Pick a pocket, conceal a handheld object, or perform legerdemain.

skill.name: Stealth
skill.entry: Escape notice by moving quietly and hiding behind things.

skill.name: Survival
skill.entry: Follow tracks, forage, find a trail, or avoid natural hazards.
